prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Whipple 3.8L Gen 5 supercharger kit (part #W175AX) for the 5.2L Predator V8 (engine code: Voodoo), increasing boost to 14 PSI, paired with a custom Lund Racing ECU calibration targeting 950 HP at the crank with 93 octane fuel and supporting mods like a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump and ID1700x injectors

Full bolt-on long-tube headers (Stainless Works 1-7/8" primary headers, part #SW-F150-1875LT) with 3" diameter catted mid-pipes (CVF Performance) to optimize exhaust scavenging and reduce backpressure for the Voodoo engine, retaining OEM catalytic converters for emissions compliance

Suspension overhaul with Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC (Dual Speed Compression) internal bypass shocks (part #980-06-181 for front, #980-06-182 for rear) with custom valving for 2.5" diameter bodies, paired with Eibach ERS (Extreme Rally Spec) 2-stage progressive-rate springs (front: 1000 lbs/in, rear: 800 lbs/in) and Hellwig anti-sway bars (front: 1.5" diameter, rear: 1.25" diameter) for reduced body roll and improved off-road articulation
estetica: RTR Motorsports 'Extreme' widebody fender flares (part #RTR-F150-RAPTOR-R-WBF) in carbon fiber with integrated LED light pods, extending track width by 3.5" per side and accommodating 37" Nitto Ridge Grappler tires on HRE FF03 22x12" wheels with +18mm offset

Custom front bumper replacement with a RCI Off-Road 'Stealth' bumper (part #RCI-F150-RAPTOR-R-FB) featuring a 3/8" thick aluminum skid plate, integrated winch mount for a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum, and auxiliary light mounts for Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods (50" light bar in the grille gap)

Full carbon fiber aero package from Anderson Composites, including a 3-piece front splitter (part #AC-F150-RAPTOR-R-SPLITTER) with adjustable dive planes, carbon fiber side skirts (part #AC-F150-RAPTOR-R-SKIRTS), and a GT-style rear wing (part #AC-F150-RAPTOR-R-WING) with 3D-printed gurney flaps, all finished in matte 'Ford Performance Blue' with exposed carbon weave accents
